violations.text: Wood is used in the construction of prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/12/2025

Wood is used in the construction of prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2023
The bottom shelf of the prep table located in the prep area was not in good repair. Fixtures must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
The floor in the walk in cooler area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2024
